original_hypothesis.title: MagicLP.ratioSync() Division by Zero When Reserve is Zero Prevents Admin Recovery
original_hypothesis.hypothesis_description: ratioSync() computes `_BASE_TARGET_ = uint112((uint256(_BASE_TARGET_) * baseBalance) / uint256(_BASE_RESERVE_))`. If _BASE_RESERVE_ is 0 (or similarly for quote), this division by zero reverts. This means the admin recovery function itself fails when the pool is in the most critical state (one reserve drained to zero), eliminating the last recovery mechanism.
original_hypothesis.investigation_rationale: If setParameters drains one reserve to zero (creating the bricked state described in INV-STATE-001), ratioSync cannot be used to restore the pool because it divides by the zero reserve. The admin has no tool to fix the broken state: sync() would also fail (via _twapUpdate → getMidPrice division by zero), setParameters calls _resetTargetAndReserve which works but only if tokens can be sent first. This creates a cascading failure where all admin recovery paths are blocked.

proof_of_signal.pattern: Division by _BASE_RESERVE_ in target calculation; no zero-check; reverts when reserve is 0

preconditions: Admin has previously drained one reserve to zero via setParameters
Admin attempts to use ratioSync to recover the pool

initial_economic_evidence.manipulation_vector: After admin drains reserves, all recovery paths fail
initial_economic_evidence.profit_hypothesis: No direct profit; results in permanently bricked pool with trapped LP funds

economic_questions: Can admin recover by sending tokens directly + calling setParameters (which calls _resetTargetAndReserve)?
Does _resetTargetAndReserve also fail when balances are zero?
Is there any other recovery path for a zero-reserve pool?
validation_requirements: Test setParameters workflow: send tokens → setParameters with 0 outAmount

investigation_priorities.calculation_validation: Confirm division by zero in ratioSync when reserve=0

validation_result.impact_summary: Filtered before validation: attack_realism is LOW
validation_result.detailed_analysis: This hypothesis was auto-rejected because its attack_realism grade is LOW. Preconditions require actions outside the attacker's control (off-chain compromise, victim cooperation, or admin collusion). No LLM validation was performed.
